title: Squirrel Removal in Orange, NJ | Best Pest Control NYC | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Orange, NJ. Expert humane trapping, exclusion, and damage repair. Licensed specialists serving Orange residents. Call for fast service!
intro: Orange, New Jersey residents facing squirrel infestations in their attics, walls, or crawl spaces can rely on Best Pest Control NYC for comprehensive squirrel removal services. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges posed by the mix of Victorian homes and modern buildings throughout Orange's neighborhoods. We provide humane, effective squirrel removal with prices ranging from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation and required repairs.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of pest control expertise to Orange, NJ, with certified technicians who specialize in humane squirrel removal and exclusion techniques. We offer same-day emergency services, comprehensive warranties, and transparent pricing with no hidden fees, ensuring your home remains squirrel-free year-round.
localContext: Orange's tree-lined streets and proximity to the South Mountain Reservation create an ideal habitat for gray squirrels seeking shelter in residential attics and commercial properties. The area's historic homes near Main Street and newer construction near the Orange train station both present unique entry points that our specialists are trained to identify and seal effectively.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Orange, NJ?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Orange typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the extent of the infestation, number of entry points, and necessary repairs. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, and cleanup. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Orange home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scampering sounds in your attic or walls, especially during dawn and dusk, chewed holes in soffits or fascia boards, squirrel droppings in the attic, damaged insulation, and visible squirrels entering or exiting your roof. If you notice any of these signs, contact us for a professional inspection.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane and legal in Orange, NJ?
faqs.answer: Yes, we follow all New Jersey wildlife regulations and use only humane trapping and exclusion methods. Our approach focuses on live trapping when necessary and preventing re-entry through professional exclusion techniques. We never use poisons or inhumane methods, and all work complies with local Orange and state wildlife laws.

faqs.question: How long does the squirrel removal process take in Orange?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Orange are completed within 3-7 days, though timeline varies based on infestation size and building complexity. The process includes initial inspection, trap placement, monitoring, removal, entry point sealing, and cleanup. We'll provide a specific timeline during your free inspection and maintain communication throughout the entire process.
